name: template-skill
tagline: Unfilled scaffold for a new Claude Code skill; contains no real instructions yet.
verdict: This is an empty template, not a working skill: frontmatter description and body are literal placeholder text with zero triggers, steps, or output contract defined. Harmless as shipped (nothing to execute) but unusable until authored — every content-quality check that applies fails.
